vocab.meaning: một nơi trú ẩn an toàn trên những bánh xe
vocab.example: To my younger self, our old family sedan was a sanctuary on wheels where I felt completely shielded from the outside world.

vocab.meaning: bị mê hoặc/cuốn hút hoàn toàn bởi
vocab.example: I used to be mesmerized by the rhythmic passing of streetlights during our late-night drives home.

vocab.meaning: thích thú với sự mới lạ
vocab.example: Every road trip was an adventure; I would revel in the novelty of seeing different landscapes and architectural styles.

vocab.meaning: vỗ về/ru tôi vào giấc ngủ
vocab.example: The gentle vibration of the engine would often soothe me to sleep within minutes of hitting the open road.
I remember pressing my face against the glass to catch panoramic views of the rolling hills in the countryside.

vocab.meaning: sự suy ngẫm một mình/trầm ngâm
vocab.example: Those long car rides provided a rare chance for solitary contemplation, even at such a tender age.

vocab.meaning: tiếng lốp xe rít trên đường (tiếng rì rì)
vocab.example: The consistent hum of the tires on the asphalt was a therapeutic sound that I still associate with my childhood.
There was always a sense of anticipatory excitement as we packed the trunk for a weekend getaway.

vocab.meaning: một kính vạn hoa thay đổi liên tục (ẩn dụ cho cảnh vật)
vocab.example: The world outside the car window felt like a shifting kaleidoscope of colors and shapes that never ceased to amaze me.

vocab.meaning: được bao bọc trong sự thoải mái
vocab.example: During winter trips, I loved being cocooned in comfort in the back seat while watching the rain lash against the window.
